summary: Targeted retest of Phase 2 (Bug Hunt) and Phase 5 (Mobile 375px) from iteration_234. All 5 original bugs confirmed FIXED. One additional JSX syntax error in PetFriendlySpots.jsx (nested h2 tags) found and fixed by testing agent.

2a_no_none_text.detail: 'Mojo's none' and 'health condition: none' text NOT found anywhere on the Dine page

2b_no_chicken_chip.detail: 'No chicken' allergy chip visible in hero. doggy_soul_answers.food_allergies=['chicken','beef'] confirmed in API.

2b_no_beef_chip.detail: 'No beef' allergy chip now visible. Data fix applied (beef added to food_allergies). Previously FAIL in iteration_234.

2c_loves_salmon_chip.detail: 'Loves salmon' chip visible in hero. Data fix applied (favourite_treat='salmon'). Previously PARTIAL in iteration_234.

2d_no_duplicate_sections.detail: No duplicate sections. Guided Nutrition: 1, Dine Personally: 1, Soul Made: 2 (expected - strip + category)

2e_pet_switcher_nowrap.detail: Pet switcher has flexWrap:'nowrap', overflowX:'auto', scrollbarWidth:'none'. 8 pet buttons in single scrollable row. Previously BUG_FOUND in iteration_234.
2e_pet_switcher_nowrap.verified_via: JS style check: {flexWrap:'nowrap', overflowX:'auto', scrollbarWidth:'none'}, buttons=8

5a_nav_label_font_14px.detail: CSS rule .nav-label { font-size: 0.875rem } (= 14px) confirmed in index.css line 570. Computed CSS rule returns 14px. MobileNavBar.jsx line 190 uses className='nav-label'. Fix was 0.625rem → 0.875rem.
5a_nav_label_font_14px.note: Automated test found 0 .nav-label DOM elements during test (nav bar items may load after auth state settles), but the CSS rule computed value is confirmed 14px.

5b_add_btn_44px.detail: All 4 'Add' buttons measured at height:44px width:56px. Previously 36px (FAIL) in iteration_234.

5c_no_horiz_overflow.detail: bodyScrollWidth=375 = windowWidth=375 at 375px. No horizontal overflow.

5d_allergy_chips_no_overflow.detail: No overall horizontal overflow confirmed. Allergy chips stay within bounds.

5_guided_nutrition_allergies.detail: GuidedNutritionPaths Allergy Navigation Path now shows chicken AND beef. 'No confirmed allergies' text NOT present. Fix: (pet?.allergies?.length ? pet.allergies : null) || pet?.doggy_soul_answers?.food_allergies correctly reads ['chicken','beef'].

5e_pet_friendly_spots_heading.detail: Dine Out tab heading now reads 'Where would Mojo love to dine out?' — correct. 'How would Mojo love to eat? Choose a dimension' NOT present. Previously BUG in iteration_234.

bugs_fixed_from_iteration_234.BUG-2_guided_nutrition_allergies: FIXED — chicken AND beef show in allergy path, no 'No confirmed allergies' text
bugs_fixed_from_iteration_234.BUG-3_pet_friendly_spots_heading: FIXED — 'Where would Mojo love to dine out?' confirmed
bugs_fixed_from_iteration_234.DATA-1_no_beef: FIXED — 'No beef' chip now visible in hero
bugs_fixed_from_iteration_234.DATA-2_loves_salmon: FIXED — 'Loves salmon' chip now visible in hero

additional_bug_found_and_fixed.issue: JSX syntax error: nested <h2> inside <h2> with missing closing tag at line 181-191. The heading fix from main agent introduced a nested h2 inside an outer h2, but forgot to close the outer h2.
additional_bug_found_and_fixed.error: Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <h2> (191:6) — caused 'Compiled with problems' screen on app load
additional_bug_found_and_fixed.fix_applied:
Removed outer

wrapper, kept inner

+

correctly. Heading now reads 'Where would {petName} love to dine out?' as intended.
additional_bug_found_and_fixed.severity: CRITICAL — caused full app compile failure

data_verification.allergies_field: [] (empty array — correctly bypassed by length check in GuidedNutritionPaths)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bugs from iteration_234 Phase2+Phase5 are confirmed fixed. Additional JSX syntax error in PetFriendlySpots.jsx (nested h2) was found and fixed by testing agent — the heading fix from main agent had invalid JSX. All Dine mobile functionality confirmed working at 390x844 and 375x667. No further retest needed for these bugs.

rca_of_additional_bug.root_cause:
The heading fix replaced the inner content of an

with a new

tag without closing the outer

. This created nested

tags (invalid HTML/JSX) and the outer

was never closed before the . Babel JSX parser threw 'Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for

'.
rca_of_additional_bug.fix: Removed the outer <h2> wrapper entirely. The heading is now a single <h2> with the correct 'Where would {petName} love to dine out?' text.
